title: SimulationData
content:
# SimulationData


## Properties

- **payload** (`any`): Value represented in one of these formats.
- **resource** (`string`): The `resource` (Asset / Data Stream pair) associated with the `payload`.
- **timestamp** (`string`): UTC time when the `payload` values were saved, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: payload, resource, timestamp

payload.description: Value represented in one of these formats.

resource.description: The `resource` (Asset / Data Stream pair) associated with the `payload`.

timestamp.description: UTC time when the `payload` values were saved, formatted in RFC 3339.
